zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Inglis於大約1565年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親John Inglis26歲，母親Janet Atkin10歲。他於1601年9月23日與Lady Euphame Kneland在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Inglis于大约1565年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲John Inglis26岁，母亲Janet Atkin10岁。他于1601年9月23日与Lady Euphame Kneland在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Inglis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Midlothian): ethnic name from Scots Inglis ‘English(man)’. Compare English .

variants.name: English
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

variants.name: Gingles
meanings: Irish: from the hybrid name Mac Inglis (Gaelic and English), meaning ‘son of the English speaker’, from Scottish Inglis . This surname is now rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Inglis was born about 1565, in Scotland, his father, John Inglis, was 26 and his mother, Janet Atkin, was 10. He married Lady Euphame Kneland on 23 September 1601, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Inglis est né environ 1565, à Écosse, son père, John Inglis, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Janet Atkin, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Lady Euphame Kneland le 23 septembre 1601, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Inglis um 1565 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Inglis 26 und seine Mutter Janet Atkin 10. Er hat am 23. September 1601 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Euphame Kneland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Inglis è nato il circa 1565 nel Scotland, il suo padre, John Inglis, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Janet Atkin, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Lady Euphame Kneland il 23 settembre 1601, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Inglisが約1565年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Inglisは26歳，母Janet Atkinは10歳であった。1601年9月23日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでLady Euphame Knelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Inglis(이)가 대략 1565년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Inglis(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Atkin(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1601년 9월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Lady Euphame Kneland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Inglis nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Scotland, seu pai, John Inglis, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Janet Atkin, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Euphame Kneland em 23 de setembro de 1601, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Inglis родился около 1565 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Inglis было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Atkin, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Euphame Kneland 23 сентября 1601 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Inglis nació aproximadamente 1565, en Scotland, su papá, John Inglis, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Janet Atkin, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Lady Euphame Kneland el 23 de septiembre de 1601, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
